subcodes.first_line: O thou faithful servant of the Divine Threshold! The letter which thou didst send through the friends of Tihran hath been received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق درگاه الهی مکتوبی که بواسطه احبای طهران ارسال فرموده بودید واصل
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @fire and light; fire and water, @firmness in the Covenant
